artifact_summary: Title page for Appendix E of a technical memorandum detailing workshop meeting notes on the HFC AWTP Master Plan and SCADA design criteria improvements.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as the title page for Appendix E of a technical memorandum. The appendix compiles workshop meeting notes focused on the HFC AWTP Master Plan and outlines specific improvements to SCADA design criteria.
